text:
The most common bug to avoid in this task is initializing the maximum sum to a very large negative number instead of the first element of the array or zero, which can lead to incorrect results when all numbers in the array are negative. 

```python
def max_subarray_sum(xs):
    if not xs:
        return 0
    max_sum = float('-inf')
    current_sum = 0
    for num in xs:
        current_sum = max(num, current_sum + num)
        max_sum = max(max_sum, current_sum)
    return max_sum
```
